input.prompt:
I'm starting a new .NET MAUI app that needs a flyout menu with two sections:
"Dashboard" (single page) and "Products" (with two sub-tabs: "Active" and
"Archived"). I also need a Settings page accessible from the flyout.
Show me how to set up AppShell.xaml with this structure, including route
registration for a ProductDetailsPage that I'll navigate to from the list.

input.initialPrompt:
I'm starting a new .NET MAUI app that needs a flyout menu with two sections:
"Dashboard" (single page) and "Products" (with two sub-tabs: "Active" and
"Archived"). I also need a Settings page accessible from the flyout.
Show me how to set up AppShell.xaml with this structure, including route
registration for a ProductDetailsPage that I'll navigate to from the list.

arguments.file_text:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" ?>
<Shell
    x:Class="MyMauiApp.AppShell"
    xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/dotnet/2021/maui"
    xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2009/xaml"
    xmlns:pages="clr-namespace:MyMauiApp.Pages"
    Title="MyMauiApp"
    FlyoutBehavior="Flyout">

    <!-- Dashboard: single page, shown as its own flyout item -->
    <FlyoutItem Title="Dashboard" Icon="dashboard.png">
        <ShellContent
            Title="Dashboard"
            ContentTemplate="{DataTemplate pages:DashboardPage}"
            Route="dashboard" />
    </FlyoutItem>

    <!-- Products: flyout item with two tabs -->
    <FlyoutItem Title="Products" Icon="products.png">
        <Tab Title="Products">
            <ShellContent
                Title="Active"
                ContentTemplate="{DataTemplate pages:ActiveProductsPage}"
                Route="active" />
            <ShellContent
                Title="Archived"
                ContentTemplate="{DataTemplate pages:ArchivedProductsPage}"
                Route="archived" />
        </Tab>
    </FlyoutItem>

    <!-- Settings: standalone flyout item -->
    <FlyoutItem Title="Settings" Icon="settings.png">
        <ShellContent
            Title="Settings"
            ContentTemplate="{DataTemplate pages:SettingsPage}"
            Route="settings" />
    </FlyoutItem>

</Shell>

data.reasoningText:
The user wants me to show them how to set up a .NET MAUI AppShell.xaml with a specific structure. This is a code generation/guidance request - I don't need to search a codebase. Let me create the files they need.

Structure:
- Flyout with sections:
  - "Dashboard" (single page)
  - "Products" (with two sub-tabs: "Active" and "Archived")
  - "Settings" page accessible from flyout
- Route registration for ProductDetailsPage (navigated to programmatically)

Let me create the AppShell.xaml and AppShell.xaml.cs files.

    <!-- Dashboard: single page, shown as its own flyout item -->
    <FlyoutItem Title="Dashboard" Icon="dashboard.png">
        <ShellContent
            Title="Dashboard"
            ContentTemplate="{DataTemplate pages:DashboardPage}"
            Route="dashboard" />
    </FlyoutItem>

    <!-- Products: flyout item with two tabs -->
    <FlyoutItem Title="Products" Icon="products.png">
        <Tab Title="Products">
            <ShellContent
                Title="Active"
                ContentTemplate="{DataTemplate pages:ActiveProductsPage}"
                Route="active" />
            <ShellContent
                Title="Archived"
                ContentTemplate="{DataTemplate pages:ArchivedProductsPage}"
                Route="archived" />
        </Tab>
    </FlyoutItem>

    <!-- Settings: standalone flyout item -->
    <FlyoutItem Title="Settings" Icon="settings.png">
        <ShellContent
            Title="Settings"
            ContentTemplate="{DataTemplate pages:SettingsPage}"
            Route="settings" />
    </FlyoutItem>

</Shell>

data.content:
Here's the breakdown:

### AppShell.xaml structure

| Flyout Item | What it shows |
|---|---|
| **Dashboard** | Single `ShellContent` → one page |
| **Products** | A `Tab` with two `ShellContent` children → bottom tabs for **Active** / **Archived** |
| **Settings** | Single `ShellContent` → one page |

### Key concepts

- **`FlyoutItem`** → entry in the hamburger/flyout menu.
- **`Tab`** wrapping multiple **`ShellContent`** → renders as bottom tabs within that flyout item.
- **`ContentTemplate` + `DataTemplate`** → lazy-loads pages (only created when navigated to).

### Route registration (AppShell.xaml.cs)

`ProductDetailsPage` is registered via `Routing.RegisterRoute` because it's a *detail* page not in the visual hierarchy. Navigate to it from any products list like this:

```csharp
await Shell.Current.GoToAsync("product/details", new Dictionary<string, object>
{
    ["Product"] = selectedProduct
});
```

Receive the parameter in `ProductDetailsPage` with the `[QueryProperty]` attribute or `IQueryAttributable`.

### Pages you'll need to create under `Pages/`

- `DashboardPage`
- `ActiveProductsPage`
- `ArchivedProductsPage`
- `SettingsPage`
- `ProductDetailsPage`

Each is a standard `ContentPage`. The icon filenames (`dashboard.png`, etc.) go in `Resources/Images`.
